query:
UPDATE nodes n
        SET reputation_score = LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(0.0,
            0.5                                  -- baseline
            + COALESCE((
                SELECT SUM(e.delta)
                FROM reputation_events e
                WHERE e.node_id = n.id
                  AND e.occurred_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
              ), 0.0)
        ))
        WHERE n.is_banned = FALSE
